name: ARILFaultInjectionDisturbNodeUpdateBits
title: ARILFaultInjectionDisturbNodeUpdateBits
syntax: long ARILFaultInjectionDisturbNodeUpdateBits (long flags, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);
description: Disturbs the Update Bit of all signals and/or signal groups that are sent by the current node (see Update Bit).

parameters.name: 0x3
parameters.description: Disturbs signal and signal group update bits of node.

parameters.name: 0x3
parameters.description: Disturbs only signal update bits of node.

parameters.name: 0x3
parameters.description: Disturbs only signal group update bits of node.
